name: Bunker Hill Golf Course
address: 3060 Pearl Rd Ste B, Medina, OH 44256
about: Bunker Hill Golf Course is a full-service facility offering both outdoor golf and indoor simulator experiences. The course features 18 holes with fairways, water hazards, and sand traps, suitable for golfers of all skill levels. Recent renovations to holes #7, #9, and #18, including a two-tiered green on the 18th and redirected creek hazards, have enhanced playability and strategic challenge. The venue also includes an indoor simulator bay available during winter months, a pro shop, and a renovated clubhouse with event space and a bar and grille.
why_golfers_like_it: Recently renovated course with improved playability and strategic challenges
Indoor simulator options available during winter months
On-site dining and event facilities for post-golf activities
Comprehensive golf lessons and junior programs available
Host to golf leagues and outings for various skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Bar and Grille on-site serves food
Bar and Grille on-site serves alcohol

simulator_hardware.notes: Indoor simulators available during winter months

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own clubs, though rentals may be available at the pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available at the on-site Bar and Grille. Outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round typically takes approximately 4-5 hours depending on pace of play and course conditions.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bunker Hill offers junior golf programs and is suitable for families with children.
